title: Plotinus, Ennead 5.4: How That Which Is After the First Comes from the First
description: Tractate 4 of Ennead 5 of Plotinus' Enneads — the foundational text of Neoplatonism.
introduction: Tractate 4 of Ennead 5 of Plotinus' Enneads — the foundational text of Neoplatonism.

translation.text: From the How That Which Is After the First Comes from the First: All things flow from the One. The One is beyond being and beyond knowledge. The soul ascends to the One through philosophical contemplation, leaving behind first the body, then the world of forms, finally even the Intellect, until it stands face to face with the source of all.
